en: How’s the weather today?

ab: ljemaljeqel a pagalju a kinaqadavan, temekel itjen tua linalja.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: paruzemulezul tucu a kinaqadavan, semuqaca itjen a temekel tua zaljum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: mezangal aravac a qadav, paqenetju a iljaljaung.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: neka nu qadav nutiav, uri nakemelebav, mezangal a vali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: uri naljemaljaqel, emuba itjen a casav.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: uri namaljenguaq a qadav nu pulavalavay.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ui, uri maljenguaq a qadav tuazua, inika uri qemudjalj.
ch: B:是的，那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?
Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?

ab: qemudjaqudjalj anga, inika ken a nakemacu ta kausua.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: neka nu qudjalj tucu, nu masukincengelj kiqemudjalj, kemacu itjen sakamaya tua kausua.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: nu icavilj a kaljaljeqelan atu’i uri ljemaljeqel kemuda?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ui, uri ljemaljeqel aravac nu icavilj, emitung itjen a pakaliav.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: tucu a cavilj a kaljazulzulan ’atui uri zemulezul?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ui, uri zumelezul aravac, semuqaca itjen a temekel tua zaljum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: tjengelay aken tua kaljavevean, sarenguaq a vali.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: inika ken a tjengelay tua kaljauraman, ru vali a kaljauraman pai.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
